article.title: SecondFi to wind down after $2.6M ADA theft linked to wallet flaw
article.summary: SecondFi will wind down after a $2.6 million ADA theft, while users still await recovery tools that were initially expected within weeks of the exploit.

headline: Galaxy Invests $5M in Bitcoin Quantum Resistance

article.title: Galaxy pledges $5M for developers quantum-proofing Bitcoin
article.summary: Galaxy pledged up to $5 million in grants for developers working on Bitcoin’s quantum security and elected a council of quantum-advisory experts to research quantum-resistant migration solutions.

article.title: Stocks Fall Ahead of Alphabet as Brent Hits $95: Markets Wrap
article.summary: US stocks fell ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings as traders waited for the clearest read yet on whether the vast sums hyperscalers are pouring into artificial intelligence will pay off. Brent topped $95 a barrel.

headline: Oil Prices Surge 4% Amid Global Supply Crisis

article.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
article.summary: Oil jumped above $95, extending this month’s price jump to 30%, as the US and Iran played down the prospect of talks and disruptions to global supplies continued to mount.

headline: Bitcoin Unfazed by $40K Proof of Node Update

article.title: Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
The proposal to temporarily restrict arbitrary data in Bitcoin transactions lacks economic nodes, protocol developers, and hashrate. History from the 2017 UASF shows nodes succeed only with broad investor and developer weight behind them.

headline: Satsuma Liquidates $43M Bitcoin Treasury Amid Crypto Turmoil

article.title: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
article.summary: The UK Bitcoin treasury company raised $218 million less than a year ago. Now it's returning whatever is left.

headline: AI Models Breach Hugging Face, $1B Exposure Rising

article.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
article.summary: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

headline: USD Stablecoins Threaten $2T FX Market Regulation

article.title: BIS warns USD stablecoins can evade capital controls, challenging traditional market regulations
article.summary: BIS says that FX restrictions and capital controls are less effective against stablecoins than against foreign currency bank deposits.

headline: US Seeks $25M Crypto Forfeiture Amid Fraud Probes

article.title: US seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to global fraud investigations
article.summary: US prosecutors seek forfeiture of $25 million in crypto recovered from five investigations into international fraud and laundering networks.

headline: $13B Venezuela Oil Funds Frozen Amid US Sanctions

article.title: The US has collected about $13bn of Venezuela’s oil money. Where is it?
article.summary: Washington has given diverging accounts of where the earthquake-shattered country’s funds are going

article.title: The UK’s biggest university is a private company
article.summary: Supporters say franchised providers widen access to further education, but others doubt the real value of their ‘no frills’ courses
